title: Dimensionalized 3D Essentials
description: The Minecraft world is flat. It's blocks don't have to be! Dimensionalized brings a new vanilla inspired 3D upgrade to the default blocks!
body:
![Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82d74f3ee76ec6d6e88ccf2586a6346e631603d7.png)
# An Enhancement to the Vanilla Textures
Dimensionalized Essentials is a 3D texture pack that aims to bring a new life to Minecraft blocks by adding 3D aspects beyond the traditional flat cubic boundary of a normal block. Dimensionalized Essentials works by taking aspects of blocks that look like they should protrude, and making them stick out! My goal is to expand every block in a vanilla friendly way.

## Update v1.6.0 Showcase
![A showcase of all the blocks added in the 1.6.0 update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78f86dc4e14e8141b4a52c0642002fbbd169b78a.png)

## Planned Additions
  - Ores
  - Doors and Trapdoors
  - Block Entities

## Currently working on:
  - Adding Ores
  - Copper Blocks For New Snapshots

## Looking Forward:
Once I develop this pack to a state I find satisfactory, I plan on releasing more resource packs under the Dimensionalized branding in the future. Tenatively I plan on creating a *Dimensionalized Redstone* for redstone components and a *Dimensionalized Foliage* for various plants, flowers, and crops in the game.

I also plan on adding custom models for block entities such as the chest and its variants, as well as for beds and decorated pots.

I am actively developing this pack, so be sure to join my Discord to provide suggestions and participate in polls about what blocks I should add next!
## FAQ's

**Q: Will you continue to update this pack for future versions?**

**A: Yes, I plan on providing timely updates to include any new essential blocks that need to be dimensionalized!**

---
**Q: What versions of the game is this resource pack backwards compatible with?**

**A:This requires more extensive testing on my part. As of now, I do not know.**

---
**Q: Will you create versions of the resource pack for older versions of Minecraft?**

**A: No, I don't have plans to create versions of Dimensionalized specifically for older game versions. However if there is significant enough demand I will consider it.**

---
**Q: I found an issue with the resource pack, where should I report it?**

**A: Please report any issues you find on my community Discord server [here](https://discord.gg/gpNt8265mg), I am always happy to find errors to squash out!**
